positive: A vibrant, geometric-abstract design featuring stylized constellations and mythical fauna integrated into celestial map motifs. The primary subject is a majestic, stylized lion head and a soaring phoenix silhouette, rendered in thick, clean linework. Incorporate negative space strategically and use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, cosmic gold, and crisp white. The composition must be central, symmetrical, and highly scalable for screen printing. Style: Art Deco mixed with modern geometric minimalism. Lighting: Studio flash, crisp and flat. Focus on clean, sharp edges and solid shapes suitable for apparel print. Vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, bad anatomy, low resolution, signature, gradient, photo, photorealistic, messy, distressed, dirty, colored background
